titleStmt.title: SII 27.405: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 405. (A.R. No. 593 of 1929-30.) HANDĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into a sluice in a field called Kambaḷagadde.

This record registers a gift of land for feeding brahmaṇas in the Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva temple (of Koḍage ?), by Sōmaṇaya, younger brother of Basavarasa-oḍeya and son of Mallarasa-oḍeya of Hārabhaṇḍi, for the merit of Narasaṇa-oḍeya. It states that the gift land was originally granted to acertain Chandaṇṇa by Dēvarāya-mahārāja.

It certains two dates, viz., (1) Śaka 1424 (1425 current), Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 5 and (2) Āsvija ba. 30, Monday, solar eclipse obviously of the year same year. The weekday was, however, Saturday. The latter probably was the date of gift while the former, the details of which are not verifiable, but corresponds to 1502 A.D., October 6, was the date when the record was put on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēṁ nama ḥ namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti
śrī jayadabadaya sālivāhana śaka varuṣa 1424 saṁdu yippa
tta Ayidaneya varttamānada duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 5 lu
basavarasavoḍeyaru śaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvarige koṭa dharmaśāsana
dakramaveṁteṁdare pūrvadalli dēvarāya mahārāyarakāladalu caṁ
daṁṇagaḷige brahmūra paḍuvabhageya komaragōṭinali viṣṇūraṁ
baḷiya variga bi yāgi kuḷavakaḍidu kōṭa
ga 20 hoṁnanu Ā caṁdaṁṇagaḷu muriduḍidu bāḷu
rege baṁda saṁmaṁdha Ā hāḷe catusīme vivara muḍalu mā
dhavana dattigaḍiyiṁda paḍuvaluteṁkalu harivariya kalaga
re yiṁ naḍava Ōṇiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kōṭināḍa bhaṭaru
saṁkaraseṭiya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kruṣṇavayidyana gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷage bitu bedegēṇiya nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 7
nu Aśvija ba 30 sōmavārada sūryyōparāga puṇya kā
ladalū narasaṇanāyaka Oḍeyarige dharṁmavāgi śrīśaṁka
ranārāyaṇadēvara saṁnidiyalu hārabhaṁḍiya malla
rasa Oḍeyara makkaḷu basavarasa Oḍeyara taṁmaṁdiru
sōmaṇayanavaru koḍageya śaṁkara nārāyaṇadēvara sa
nidhiyalū naḍasuva brāṁhmaṇa bhōjanakke Ācaṁdrārka sthā
yiyāgi dharṁmanaḍaudake dhāreya neradu koṭa dharṁmaśāsa
na dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācrēyōnupālanaṁ dānā
svargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁpadaṁ yī bāḷa gēṇi
Aki maṭada sōvabhaṭage naḍadu bahadu
Digital edition of SII 27.405 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
